description_long: This object is a modern smartphone with a rectangular, flat design and a matte black finish. The front features a large touchscreen display with thin bezels, a front-facing camera, and visible app icons and widgets, indicating it is powered on. The back is adorned with a bright green, stylized triple-snake logo centered below a dual-lens camera module, which is horizontally aligned near the top. The sides are slim and appear to house physical buttons and a port, likely for power, volume, and charging. The device is constructed primarily from metal and glass, with a solid, premium build quality. Its overall appearance is sleek and minimalist, suitable for contemporary urban environments.
description: A sleek, matte black smartphone with a large touchscreen, dual rear cameras, and a bright green logo on the back. The device features a modern, minimalist design with visible side buttons and a powered-on display.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large touchscreen display, front-facing camera, and active interface with app icons and widgets.
description_view_1: Left side profile revealing the slimness of the device and a visible port, likely for charging or data transfer.
description_view_2: Back view displaying the matte black surface, bright green triple-snake logo, and horizontally aligned dual camera module.
description_view_3: Right side profile showing the slim edge and faint outlines of physical buttons, likely for power and volume control.
attribute_brand_logo: A bright green triple-snake logo is centered on the back of the device, standing out against the matte black surface.
attribute_screen_display_content: The screen displays a colorful geometric wallpaper, several app icons, a Google search bar, and a translucent widget, indicating the device is powered on and running an Android interface.
attribute_camera_placement: There are two rear camera lenses arranged horizontally near the top center of the back, with a small flash module between them. A single front-facing camera is located at the top left of the front display.
attribute_button_layout: Physical buttons are visible on the right edge, likely for power and volume control, with a port on the left edge for charging or data transfer.
